category_sources: The official openshift/oc repository describes oc as the OpenShift Client CLI for managing OpenShift resources.
source_facts.description says it provides OpenShift command-line interface tools.
display_name_sources: The official openshift/oc repository README uses the name OpenShift Client CLI (oc).
docs_sources: Official Red Hat OpenShift documentation provides the OpenShift CLI oc documentation page.
repo_sources: The official openshift/oc repository describes itself as the OpenShift Client CLI, part of OKD.
tags_sources: The official repository states oc is built on kubectl and manages OpenShift resources.
